title: Science Corporation’s vision-restoring chip wins EU approval
summary: Science Corporation, a start-up developing novel brain-computer interfaces (BCI), won approval from Europe’s medical device regulator to begin selling a device that restores vision lost from age-related macular degeneration. No matter your goal, Disrupt can empower you.
